category_sources: Official README calls SL a joke command that runs a steam locomotive across the terminal.
source_facts.description says it prints a steam locomotive when sl is typed instead of ls.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use sl / SL(1).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the joke command: https://github.com/mtoyoda/sl#readme.
Official repository includes the sl.1 man page: https://github.com/mtoyoda/sl/blob/master/sl.1.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mtoyoda/sl; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README describes SL as a steam-locomotive joke command.
